availableCommands.name: debug
availableCommands.description: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues (bundled)

availableCommands.name: simplify
availableCommands.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: batch
availableCommands.description: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5тАУ30 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: loop
availableCommands.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) (bundled)

availableCommands.name: claude-api
availableCommands.description:
Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK.
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK.
DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: gsd:plan-phase
availableCommands.description: Create detailed phase plan (PLAN.md) with verification loop (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:add-todo
availableCommands.description: Capture idea or task as todo from current conversation context (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:insert-phase
availableCommands.description: Insert urgent work as decimal phase (e.g., 72.1) between existing phases (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:join-discord
availableCommands.description: Join the GSD Discord community (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:verify-work
availableCommands.description: Validate built features through conversational UAT (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:debug
availableCommands.description: Systematic debugging with persistent state across context resets (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:update
availableCommands.description: Update GSD to latest version with changelog display (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:help
availableCommands.description: Show available GSD commands and usage guide (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:progress
availableCommands.description: Check project progress, show context, and route to next action (execute or plan) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:resume-work
availableCommands.description: Resume work from previous session with full context restoration (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:execute-phase
availableCommands.description: Execute all plans in a phase with wave-based parallelization (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:new-project
availableCommands.description: Initialize a new project with deep context gathering and PROJECT.md (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:set-profile
availableCommands.description: Switch model profile for GSD agents (quality/balanced/budget) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:map-codebase
availableCommands.description: Analyze codebase with parallel mapper agents to produce .planning/codebase/ documents (user)

input.hint: [optional: specific area to map, e.g., 'api' or 'auth']

availableCommands.description: Audit milestone completion against original intent before archiving (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:discuss-phase
availableCommands.description: Gather phase context through adaptive questioning before planning (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:remove-phase
availableCommands.description: Remove a future phase from roadmap and renumber subsequent phases (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:add-phase

availableCommands.name: gsd:quick

rawInput.prompt:
Review the code changes on branch `origin/fix/bug-persistence` compared to `main` in this repository. The diff covers these files:

1. `src/main/session-store.ts` тАФ atomic writes for workspace persistence  
2. `src/main/mobile-server/routes/workspace.ts` тАФ workspace save route fix
3. `src/main/meta-project-sync.ts` тАФ stale symlink cleanup
4. `src/main/orchestrator-api.ts` тАФ port fallback improvements
5. `src/main/mobile-server/middleware.ts` тАФ CORS origin validation hardening
6. `src/main/mobile-server/websocket-manager.ts` тАФ PTY exit cleanup
7. `src/main/app/ipc-handlers/pty.ts` тАФ race condition guard
8. `src/main/mobile-security/auth-rate-limit.ts` тАФ block expiry fix
9. `src/main/ipc/kspec-handlers.ts` тАФ migration status mapping
10. `src/renderer/components/beads/adapters/kspec-adapter.ts` тАФ daemon recovery, status mapping, WS reconnect
11. `src/renderer/components/beads/useBeadsTasks.ts` тАФ use cycleStatus instead of direct update

For each file, read the current version on main and identify:
- Any bugs or correctness issues in the changes
- Race conditions or edge cases not addressed
- Any regressions introduced by the changes
- Security issues

Focus especially on:
- session-store.ts atomic write logic
- workspace.ts route double-wrapping issue
- kspec-adapter.ts shared mutable state (_daemonEnsuredFlag as module-level)
- orchestrator-api.ts port retry logic

Read each file fully and provide a detailed review.

content.text:
Review the code changes on branch `origin/fix/bug-persistence` compared to `main` in this repository. The diff covers these files:

1. `src/main/session-store.ts` тАФ atomic writes for workspace persistence  
2. `src/main/mobile-server/routes/workspace.ts` тАФ workspace save route fix
3. `src/main/meta-project-sync.ts` тАФ stale symlink cleanup
4. `src/main/orchestrator-api.ts` тАФ port fallback improvements
5. `src/main/mobile-server/middleware.ts` тАФ CORS origin validation hardening
6. `src/main/mobile-server/websocket-manager.ts` тАФ PTY exit cleanup
7. `src/main/app/ipc-handlers/pty.ts` тАФ race condition guard
8. `src/main/mobile-security/auth-rate-limit.ts` тАФ block expiry fix
9. `src/main/ipc/kspec-handlers.ts` тАФ migration status mapping
10. `src/renderer/components/beads/adapters/kspec-adapter.ts` тАФ daemon recovery, status mapping, WS reconnect
11. `src/renderer/components/beads/useBeadsTasks.ts` тАФ use cycleStatus instead of direct update

For each file, read the current version on main and identify:
- Any bugs or correctness issues in the changes
- Race conditions or edge cases not addressed
- Any regressions introduced by the changes
- Security issues

Focus especially on:
- session-store.ts atomic write logic
- workspace.ts route double-wrapping issue
- kspec-adapter.ts shared mutable state (_daemonEnsuredFlag as module-level)
- orchestrator-api.ts port retry logic

Read each file fully and provide a detailed review.

     1тЖТimport { app } from 'electron'
     2тЖТimport { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, renameSync, statSync } from 'fs'
     3тЖТimport { join } from 'path'
     4тЖТimport { syncMetaProjects } from './meta-project-sync'
     5тЖТ
     6тЖТexport interface ProjectCategory {
     7тЖТ  id: string
     8тЖТ  name: string
     9тЖТ  collapsed: boolean
    10тЖТ  order: number
    11тЖТ}
    12тЖТ
    13тЖТexport interface Project {
    14тЖТ  path: string
    15тЖТ  name: string
    16тЖТ  executable?: string
    17тЖТ  apiPort?: number  // Port for HTTP API to send prompts to terminal
    18тЖТ  apiAutoStart?: boolean  // Whether to auto-start API when session opens (default: false)
    19тЖТ  apiSessionMode?: 'existing' | 'new-keep' | 'new-close'  // How API requests handle sessions
    20тЖТ  apiModel?: 'default' | 'opus' | 'sonnet' | 'haiku'  // Model for API-triggered sessions
    21тЖТ  autoAcceptTools?: string[]  // Per-project tool patterns to auto-accept
    22тЖТ  permissionMode?: string     // Per-project permission mode
    23тЖТ  color?: string              // Project color for visual identification
    24тЖТ  ttsVoice?: string           // Per-project TTS voice (overrides global)
    25тЖТ  ttsEngine?: 'piper' | 'xtts'  // Per-project TTS engine
    26тЖТ  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider' // Per-project backend (overrides global)
    27тЖТ  categoryId?: string         // Category this project belongs to
    28тЖТ  order?: number              // Order within category or uncategorized list
    29тЖТ}
    30тЖТ
    31тЖТexport interface OpenTab {
    32тЖТ  id: string
    33тЖТ  projectPath: string
    34тЖТ  sessionId?: string
    35тЖТ  title: string
    36тЖТ  ptyId?: string
    37тЖТ  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    38тЖТ}
    39тЖТ
    40тЖТexport interface TileLayout {
    41тЖТ  id: string
    42тЖТ  tabIds: string[]
    43тЖТ  activeTabId: string
    44тЖТ  x: number
    45тЖТ  y: number
    46тЖТ  width: number
    47тЖТ  height: number
    48тЖТ}
    49тЖТ
    50тЖТexport interface Workspace {
    51тЖТ  projects: Project[]
    52тЖТ  openTabs: OpenTab[]
    53тЖТ  activeTabId: string | null
    54тЖТ  viewMode?: 'tabs' | 'tiled'
    55тЖТ  tileLayout?: TileLayout[]
    56тЖТ  categories?: ProjectCategory[]
    57тЖТ}
    58тЖТ
    59тЖТexport interface WindowBounds {
    60тЖТ  x: number
    61тЖТ  y: number
    62тЖТ  width: number
    63тЖТ  height: number
    64тЖТ}
    65тЖТ
    66тЖТexport interface ThemeCustomization {
    67тЖТ  accentColor: string | null
    68тЖТ  backgroundColor: string | null
    69тЖТ  textColor: string | null
    70тЖТ  terminalColors: {
    71тЖТ    black?: string
    72тЖТ    red?: string
    73тЖТ    green?: string
    74тЖТ    yellow?: string
    75тЖТ    blue?: string
    76тЖТ    magenta?: string
    77тЖТ    cyan?: string
    78тЖТ    white?: string
    79тЖТ  } | null
    80тЖТ}
    81тЖТ
    82тЖТexport interface Settings {
    83тЖТ  defaultProjectDir: string
    84тЖТ  theme: string
    85тЖТ  themeCustomization?: ThemeCustomization | null
    86тЖТ  voiceOutputEnabled?: boolean
    87тЖТ  voiceVolume?: number
    88тЖТ  voiceSpeed?: number
    89тЖТ  voiceSkipOnNew?: boolean
    90тЖТ  voiceSilenceThreshold?: number
    91тЖТ  autoAcceptTools?: string[]
    92тЖТ  permissionMode?: string
    93тЖТ  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    94тЖТ}
    95тЖТ
    96тЖТ
    97тЖТinterface StoredData {
    98тЖТ  workspace: Workspace
    99тЖТ  windowBounds?: WindowBounds
   100тЖТ  settings?: Settings
   101тЖТ}
   102тЖТ
   103тЖТexport class SessionStore {
   104тЖТ  private configPath: string
   105тЖТ  private backupPath: string
   106тЖТ  private data: StoredData
   107тЖТ
   108тЖТ  constructor() {
   109тЖТ    const configDir = join(app.getPath('userData'), 'config')
   110тЖТ    if (!existsSync(configDir)) {
   111тЖТ      mkdirSync(configDir, { recursive: true })
   112тЖТ    }
   113тЖТ    this.configPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json')
   114тЖТ    this.backupPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json.backup')
   115тЖТ    this.data = this.load()
   116тЖТ  }
   117тЖТ
   118тЖТ  private loadFile(path: string): StoredData | null {
   119тЖТ    try {
   120тЖТ      if (!existsSync(path)) return null
   121тЖТ      const stat = statSync(path)
   122тЖТ      if (stat.size === 0) return null
   123тЖТ      const content = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
   124тЖТ      const data = JSON.parse(content)
   125тЖТ      if (!data?.workspace) return null
   126тЖТ      return data
   127тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   128тЖТ      console.error(`[SessionStore] Failed to load ${path}:`, e)
   129тЖТ      return null
   130тЖТ    }
   131тЖТ  }
   132тЖТ
   133тЖТ  private load(): StoredData {
   134тЖТ    // Try main file first
   135тЖТ    const main = this.loadFile(this.configPath)
   136тЖТ    if (main && (main.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   137тЖТ      return main
   138тЖТ    }
   139тЖТ
   140тЖТ    // Main file is empty/corrupt/missing тАФ try backup
   141тЖТ    const backup = this.loadFile(this.backupPath)
   142тЖТ    if (backup && (backup.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   143тЖТ      console.log('[SessionStore] Main config empty/corrupt, restored from backup (' +
   144тЖТ        backup.workspace.projects.length + ' projects)')
   145тЖТ      // Restore backup as main file immediately
   146тЖТ      try {
   147тЖТ        writeFileSync(this.configPath, JSON.stringify(backup, null, 2))
   148тЖТ      } catch (e) {
   149тЖТ        console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to restore backup to main:', e)
   150тЖТ      }
   151тЖТ      return backup
   152тЖТ    }
   153тЖТ
   154тЖТ    // If main loaded but had 0 projects (valid empty state), use it
   155тЖТ    if (main) return main
   156тЖТ
   157тЖТ    return {
   158тЖТ      workspace: {
   159тЖТ        projects: [],
   160тЖТ        openTabs: [],
   161тЖТ        activeTabId: null
   162тЖТ      }
   163тЖТ    }
   164тЖТ  }
   165тЖТ
   166тЖТ  private save(): void {
   167тЖТ    try {
   168тЖТ      const json = JSON.stringify(this.data, null, 2)
   169тЖТ
   170тЖТ      // Validate we can parse what we're about to write
   171тЖТ      JSON.parse(json)
   172тЖТ
   173тЖТ      // Back up existing file before overwriting (if it has content)
   174тЖТ      if (existsSync(this.configPath)) {
   175тЖТ        try {
   176тЖТ          const stat = statSync(this.configPath)
   177тЖТ          if (stat.size > 0) {
   178тЖТ            // Only update backup if existing file is valid and has projects
   179тЖТ            const existing = this.loadFile(this.configPath)
   180тЖТ            if (existing && (existing.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   181тЖТ              writeFileSync(this.backupPath, readFileSync(this.configPath))
   182тЖТ            }
   183тЖТ          }
   184тЖТ        } catch (e) {
   185тЖТ          console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to update backup:', e)
   186тЖТ        }
   187тЖТ      }
   188тЖТ
   189тЖТ      // Atomic write: write to temp file, then rename
   190тЖТ      const tmpPath = this.configPath + '.tmp'
   191тЖТ      writeFileSync(tmpPath, json)
   192тЖТ
   193тЖТ      // Verify the temp file was written completely
   194тЖТ      const written = readFileSync(tmpPath, 'utf-8')
   195тЖТ      JSON.parse(written) // throws if truncated/corrupt
   196тЖТ
   197тЖТ      renameSync(tmpPath, this.configPath)
   198тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   199тЖТ      console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to save workspace:', e)
   200тЖТ    }
   201тЖТ  }
   202тЖТ
   203тЖТ  getWorkspace(): Workspace {
   204тЖТ    return this.data.workspace
   205тЖТ  }
   206тЖТ
   207тЖТ  // Reload workspace from disk (useful when file was modified externally)
   208тЖТ  reloadFromDisk(): void {
   209тЖТ    console.log('[SessionStore] Reloading workspace from disk')
   210тЖТ    this.data = this.load()
   211тЖТ    console.log('[SessionStore] Reloaded, projects:', this.data.workspace?.projects?.length || 0)
   212тЖТ  }
   213тЖТ
   214тЖТ  saveWorkspace(workspace: Workspace): void {
   215тЖТ    // Protect against overwriting populated workspace with empty one
   216тЖТ    const incomingProjects = workspace?.projects?.length || 0
   217тЖТ    const currentProjects = this.data.workspace?.projects?.length || 0
   218тЖТ    if (incomingProjects === 0 && currentProjects > 0) {
   219тЖТ      console.log('[SessionStore] Rejected empty workspace save - current has', currentProjects, 'projects')
   220тЖТ      return
   221тЖТ    }
   222тЖТ    this.data.workspace = workspace
   223тЖТ    this.save()
   224тЖТ    syncMetaProjects(workspace)
   225тЖТ  }
   226тЖТ
   227тЖТ  getWindowBounds(): WindowBounds | undefined {
   228тЖТ    return this.data.windowBounds
   229тЖТ  }
   230тЖТ
   231тЖТ  saveWindowBounds(bounds: WindowBounds): void {
   232тЖТ    this.data.windowBounds = bounds
   233тЖТ    this.save()
   234тЖТ  }
   235тЖТ
   236тЖТ  getSettings(): Settings {
   237тЖТ    return this.data.settings ?? { defaultProjectDir: '', theme: 'default', backend: 'default' }
   238тЖТ  }
   239тЖТ
   240тЖТ  saveSettings(settings: Settings): void {
   241тЖТ    this.data.settings = settings
   242тЖТ    this.save()
   243тЖТ  }
   244тЖТ}
   245тЖТ

1тЖТ/**
     2тЖТ * WebSocket Manager - WebSocket handling
     3тЖТ */
     4тЖТ
     5тЖТimport { WebSocket, WebSocketServer } from 'ws'
     6тЖТimport { Server } from 'http'
     7тЖТimport { log } from './utils'
     8тЖТimport { PendingFile } from './types'
     9тЖТ
    10тЖТexport interface WebSocketManagerDeps {
    11тЖТ  getToken: () => string
    12тЖТ  getPtyManager: () => any
    13тЖТ  getPort: () => number
    14тЖТ  getTerminalSubscriptions: () => Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
    15тЖТ  getPtyStreams: () => Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
    16тЖТ  getPtyDataBuffer: () => Map<string, string[]>
    17тЖТ  getConnectedClients: () => Set<WebSocket>
    18тЖТ  getPendingFiles: () => Map<string, PendingFile>
    19тЖТ}
    20тЖТ
    21тЖТexport function setupWebSocket(server: Server, deps: WebSocketManagerDeps): WebSocketServer {
    22тЖТ  const wss = new WebSocketServer({ noServer: true })
    23тЖТ
    24тЖТ  // Handle upgrade requests manually to support multiple paths
    25тЖТ  server.on('upgrade', (req, socket, head) => {
    26тЖТ    const url = new URL(req.url || '', `http://localhost:${deps.getPort()}`)
    27тЖТ    const pathname = url.pathname
    28тЖТ
    29тЖТ    // Get token from Sec-WebSocket-Protocol header (preferred) or query string (fallback)
    30тЖТ    const protocolHeader = req.headers['sec-websocket-protocol'] as string | undefined
    31тЖТ    const protocols = protocolHeader?.split(',').map(p => p.trim()) || []
    32тЖТ    const tokenFromProtocol = protocols.find(p => p.startsWith('token-'))?.slice(6)
    33тЖТ    const tokenFromQuery = url.searchParams.get('token')
    34тЖТ    const token = tokenFromProtocol || tokenFromQuery
    35тЖТ
    36тЖТ    log('WebSocket upgrade request', {
    37тЖТ      url: req.url,
    38тЖТ      pathname,
    39тЖТ      hasProtocolToken: !!tokenFromProtocol,
    40тЖТ      hasQueryToken: !!tokenFromQuery,
    41тЖТ      headers: {
    42тЖТ        host: req.headers.host,
    43тЖТ        origin: req.headers.origin,
    44тЖТ        upgrade: req.headers.upgrade
    45тЖТ      }
    46тЖТ    })
    47тЖТ
    48тЖТ    // Validate token for all WebSocket connections
    49тЖТ    if (token !== deps.getToken()) {
    50тЖТ      log('WebSocket auth failed', { providedToken: token?.slice(0, 8) })
    51тЖТ      socket.write('HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized\r\n\r\n')
    52тЖТ      socket.destroy()
    53тЖТ      return
    54тЖТ    }
    55тЖТ
    56тЖТ    // Handle PTY stream WebSocket: /api/pty/:id/stream
    57тЖТ    const ptyStreamMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/pty\/([^/]+)\/stream$/)
    58тЖТ    if (ptyStreamMatch) {
    59тЖТ      const ptyId = ptyStreamMatch[1]
    60тЖТ      handlePtyStreamUpgrade(req, socket, head, ptyId, deps)
    61тЖТ      return
    62тЖТ    }
    63тЖТ
    64тЖТ    // Handle main WebSocket path: /ws
    65тЖТ    if (pathname === '/ws') {
    66тЖТ      wss.handleUpgrade(req, socket, head, (ws) => {
    67тЖТ        wss.emit('connection', ws, req)
    68тЖТ      })
    69тЖТ      return
    70тЖТ    }
    71тЖТ
    72тЖТ    // Unknown WebSocket path
    73тЖТ    log('Unknown WebSocket path', { pathname })
    74тЖТ    socket.write('HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found\r\n\r\n')
    75тЖТ    socket.destroy()
    76тЖТ  })
    77тЖТ
    78тЖТ  wss.on('connection', (ws: WebSocket, _req) => {
    79тЖТ    log('WebSocket client connected (main)')
    80тЖТ
    81тЖТ    deps.getConnectedClients().add(ws)
    82тЖТ
    83тЖТ    ws.on('message', (message: Buffer) => {
    84тЖТ      try {
    85тЖТ        const msg = JSON.parse(message.toString())
    86тЖТ        handleWebSocketMessage(ws, msg, deps)
    87тЖТ      } catch (e) {
    88тЖТ        log('Invalid WebSocket message', { error: String(e) })
    89тЖТ      }
    90тЖТ    })
    91тЖТ
    92тЖТ    ws.on('close', () => {
    93тЖТ      deps.getConnectedClients().delete(ws)
    94тЖТ
    95тЖТ      deps.getTerminalSubscriptions().forEach((subscribers, ptyId) => {
    96тЖТ        subscribers.delete(ws)
    97тЖТ        if (subscribers.size === 0) {
    98тЖТ          deps.getTerminalSubscriptions().delete(ptyId)
    99тЖТ        }
   100тЖТ      })
   101тЖТ      log('WebSocket client disconnected (main)')
   102тЖТ    })
   103тЖТ
   104тЖТ    // Send welcome message
   105тЖТ    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'connected', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   106тЖТ
   107тЖТ    // Send any pending files to new client
   108тЖТ    sendPendingFilesToClient(ws, deps.getPendingFiles())
   109тЖТ  })
   110тЖТ
   111тЖТ  return wss
   112тЖТ}
   113тЖТ
   114тЖТfunction handlePtyStreamUpgrade(
   115тЖТ  req: any,
   116тЖТ  socket: any,
   117тЖТ  head: any,
   118тЖТ  ptyId: string,
   119тЖТ  deps: WebSocketManagerDeps
   120тЖТ): void {
   121тЖТ  const ptyManager = deps.getPtyManager()
   122тЖТ  if (!ptyManager || !ptyManager.getProcess(ptyId)) {
   123тЖТ    log('PTY stream upgrade failed - PTY not found', { ptyId })
   124тЖТ    socket.write('HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found\r\n\r\n')
   125тЖТ    socket.destroy()
   126тЖТ    return
   127тЖТ  }
   128тЖТ
   129тЖТ  const streamWss = new WebSocketServer({ noServer: true })
   130тЖТ
   131тЖТ  streamWss.handleUpgrade(req, socket, head, (ws) => {
   132тЖТ    log('PTY stream connected', { ptyId })
   133тЖТ
   134тЖТ    const ptyStreams = deps.getPtyStreams()
   135тЖТ    if (!ptyStreams.has(ptyId)) {
   136тЖТ      ptyStreams.set(ptyId, new Set())
   137тЖТ    }
   138тЖТ    ptyStreams.get(ptyId)!.add(ws)
   139тЖТ
   140тЖТ    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'connected', ptyId }))
   141тЖТ
   142тЖТ    // Flush any buffered data
   143тЖТ    flushPtyBuffer(ptyId, ws, deps.getPtyDataBuffer())
   144тЖТ
   145тЖТ    ws.on('message', (message: Buffer) => {
   146тЖТ      try {
   147тЖТ        const msg = JSON.parse(message.toString())
   148тЖТ
   149тЖТ        switch (msg.type) {
   150тЖТ          case 'input':
   151тЖТ            if (msg.data && ptyManager) {
   152тЖТ              ptyManager.write(ptyId, msg.data)
   153тЖТ            }
   154тЖТ            break
   155тЖТ
   156тЖТ          case 'resize':
   157тЖТ            if (msg.cols && msg.rows && ptyManager) {
   158тЖТ              ptyManager.resize(ptyId, msg.cols, msg.rows)
   159тЖТ            }
   160тЖТ            break
   161тЖТ
   162тЖТ          case 'ping':
   163тЖТ            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   164тЖТ            break
   165тЖТ
   166тЖТ          default:
   167тЖТ            log('Unknown PTY stream message type', { type: msg.type, ptyId })
   168тЖТ        }
   169тЖТ      } catch (e) {
   170тЖТ        log('Invalid PTY stream message', { error: String(e), ptyId })
   171тЖТ      }
   172тЖТ    })
   173тЖТ
   174тЖТ    ws.on('close', () => {
   175тЖТ      log('PTY stream disconnected', { ptyId })
   176тЖТ      ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   177тЖТ      if (ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.size === 0) {
   178тЖТ        ptyStreams.delete(ptyId)
   179тЖТ      }
   180тЖТ    })
   181тЖТ
   182тЖТ    ws.on('error', (err) => {
   183тЖТ      log('PTY stream error', { error: String(err), ptyId })
   184тЖТ      ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   185тЖТ    })
   186тЖТ  })
   187тЖТ}
   188тЖТ
   189тЖТfunction handleWebSocketMessage(ws: WebSocket, msg: any, deps: WebSocketManagerDeps): void {
   190тЖТ  const ptyManager = deps.getPtyManager()
   191тЖТ  const terminalSubscriptions = deps.getTerminalSubscriptions()
   192тЖТ
   193тЖТ  switch (msg.type) {
   194тЖТ    case 'subscribe':
   195тЖТ      if (msg.ptyId) {
   196тЖТ        if (!terminalSubscriptions.has(msg.ptyId)) {
   197тЖТ          terminalSubscriptions.set(msg.ptyId, new Set())
   198тЖТ        }
   199тЖТ        terminalSubscriptions.get(msg.ptyId)!.add(ws)
   200тЖТ        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'subscribed', ptyId: msg.ptyId }))
   201тЖТ      }
   202тЖТ      break
   203тЖТ
   204тЖТ    case 'unsubscribe':
   205тЖТ      if (msg.ptyId) {
   206тЖТ        terminalSubscriptions.get(msg.ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   207тЖТ      }
   208тЖТ      break
   209тЖТ
   210тЖТ    case 'write':
   211тЖТ      if (msg.ptyId && msg.data && ptyManager) {
   212тЖТ        ptyManager.write(msg.ptyId, msg.data)
   213тЖТ      }
   214тЖТ      break
   215тЖТ
   216тЖТ    case 'resize':
   217тЖТ      if (msg.ptyId && msg.cols && msg.rows && ptyManager) {
   218тЖТ        ptyManager.resize(msg.ptyId, msg.cols, msg.rows)
   219тЖТ      }
   220тЖТ      break
   221тЖТ
   222тЖТ    case 'ping':
   223тЖТ      ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   224тЖТ      break
   225тЖТ  }
   226тЖТ}
   227тЖТ
   228тЖТfunction flushPtyBuffer(ptyId: string, ws: WebSocket, ptyDataBuffer: Map<string, string[]>): void {
   229тЖТ  const buffer = ptyDataBuffer.get(ptyId)
   230тЖТ  if (!buffer || buffer.length === 0) return
   231тЖТ

     1тЖТ/**
     2тЖТ * WebSocket Manager - WebSocket handling
     3тЖТ */
     4тЖТ
     5тЖТimport { WebSocket, WebSocketServer } from 'ws'
     6тЖТimport { Server } from 'http'
     7тЖТimport { log } from './utils'
     8тЖТimport { PendingFile } from './types'
     9тЖТ
    10тЖТexport interface WebSocketManagerDeps {
    11тЖТ  getToken: () => string
    12тЖТ  getPtyManager: () => any
    13тЖТ  getPort: () => number
    14тЖТ  getTerminalSubscriptions: () => Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
    15тЖТ  getPtyStreams: () => Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
    16тЖТ  getPtyDataBuffer: () => Map<string, string[]>
    17тЖТ  getConnectedClients: () => Set<WebSocket>
    18тЖТ  getPendingFiles: () => Map<string, PendingFile>
    19тЖТ}
    20тЖТ
    21тЖТexport function setupWebSocket(server: Server, deps: WebSocketManagerDeps): WebSocketServer {
    22тЖТ  const wss = new WebSocketServer({ noServer: true })
    23тЖТ
    24тЖТ  // Handle upgrade requests manually to support multiple paths
    25тЖТ  server.on('upgrade', (req, socket, head) => {
    26тЖТ    const url = new URL(req.url || '', `http://localhost:${deps.getPort()}`)
    27тЖТ    const pathname = url.pathname
    28тЖТ
    29тЖТ    // Get token from Sec-WebSocket-Protocol header (preferred) or query string (fallback)
    30тЖТ    const protocolHeader = req.headers['sec-websocket-protocol'] as string | undefined
    31тЖТ    const protocols = protocolHeader?.split(',').map(p => p.trim()) || []
    32тЖТ    const tokenFromProtocol = protocols.find(p => p.startsWith('token-'))?.slice(6)
    33тЖТ    const tokenFromQuery = url.searchParams.get('token')
    34тЖТ    const token = tokenFromProtocol || tokenFromQuery
    35тЖТ
    36тЖТ    log('WebSocket upgrade request', {
    37тЖТ      url: req.url,
    38тЖТ      pathname,
    39тЖТ      hasProtocolToken: !!tokenFromProtocol,
    40тЖТ      hasQueryToken: !!tokenFromQuery,
    41тЖТ      headers: {
    42тЖТ        host: req.headers.host,
    43тЖТ        origin: req.headers.origin,
    44тЖТ        upgrade: req.headers.upgrade
    45тЖТ      }
    46тЖТ    })
    47тЖТ
    48тЖТ    // Validate token for all WebSocket connections
    49тЖТ    if (token !== deps.getToken()) {
    50тЖТ      log('WebSocket auth failed', { providedToken: token?.slice(0, 8) })
    51тЖТ      socket.write('HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized\r\n\r\n')
    52тЖТ      socket.destroy()
    53тЖТ      return
    54тЖТ    }
    55тЖТ
    56тЖТ    // Handle PTY stream WebSocket: /api/pty/:id/stream
    57тЖТ    const ptyStreamMatch = pathname.match(/^\/api\/pty\/([^/]+)\/stream$/)
    58тЖТ    if (ptyStreamMatch) {
    59тЖТ      const ptyId = ptyStreamMatch[1]
    60тЖТ      handlePtyStreamUpgrade(req, socket, head, ptyId, deps)
    61тЖТ      return
    62тЖТ    }
    63тЖТ
    64тЖТ    // Handle main WebSocket path: /ws
    65тЖТ    if (pathname === '/ws') {
    66тЖТ      wss.handleUpgrade(req, socket, head, (ws) => {
    67тЖТ        wss.emit('connection', ws, req)
    68тЖТ      })
    69тЖТ      return
    70тЖТ    }
    71тЖТ
    72тЖТ    // Unknown WebSocket path
    73тЖТ    log('Unknown WebSocket path', { pathname })
    74тЖТ    socket.write('HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found\r\n\r\n')
    75тЖТ    socket.destroy()
    76тЖТ  })
    77тЖТ
    78тЖТ  wss.on('connection', (ws: WebSocket, _req) => {
    79тЖТ    log('WebSocket client connected (main)')
    80тЖТ
    81тЖТ    deps.getConnectedClients().add(ws)
    82тЖТ
    83тЖТ    ws.on('message', (message: Buffer) => {
    84тЖТ      try {
    85тЖТ        const msg = JSON.parse(message.toString())
    86тЖТ        handleWebSocketMessage(ws, msg, deps)
    87тЖТ      } catch (e) {
    88тЖТ        log('Invalid WebSocket message', { error: String(e) })
    89тЖТ      }
    90тЖТ    })
    91тЖТ
    92тЖТ    ws.on('close', () => {
    93тЖТ      deps.getConnectedClients().delete(ws)
    94тЖТ
    95тЖТ      deps.getTerminalSubscriptions().forEach((subscribers, ptyId) => {
    96тЖТ        subscribers.delete(ws)
    97тЖТ        if (subscribers.size === 0) {
    98тЖТ          deps.getTerminalSubscriptions().delete(ptyId)
    99тЖТ        }
   100тЖТ      })
   101тЖТ      log('WebSocket client disconnected (main)')
   102тЖТ    })
   103тЖТ
   104тЖТ    // Send welcome message
   105тЖТ    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'connected', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   106тЖТ
   107тЖТ    // Send any pending files to new client
   108тЖТ    sendPendingFilesToClient(ws, deps.getPendingFiles())
   109тЖТ  })
   110тЖТ
   111тЖТ  return wss
   112тЖТ}
   113тЖТ
   114тЖТfunction handlePtyStreamUpgrade(
   115тЖТ  req: any,
   116тЖТ  socket: any,
   117тЖТ  head: any,
   118тЖТ  ptyId: string,
   119тЖТ  deps: WebSocketManagerDeps
   120тЖТ): void {
   121тЖТ  const ptyManager = deps.getPtyManager()
   122тЖТ  if (!ptyManager || !ptyManager.getProcess(ptyId)) {
   123тЖТ    log('PTY stream upgrade failed - PTY not found', { ptyId })
   124тЖТ    socket.write('HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found\r\n\r\n')
   125тЖТ    socket.destroy()
   126тЖТ    return
   127тЖТ  }
   128тЖТ
   129тЖТ  const streamWss = new WebSocketServer({ noServer: true })
   130тЖТ
   131тЖТ  streamWss.handleUpgrade(req, socket, head, (ws) => {
   132тЖТ    log('PTY stream connected', { ptyId })
   133тЖТ
   134тЖТ    const ptyStreams = deps.getPtyStreams()
   135тЖТ    if (!ptyStreams.has(ptyId)) {
   136тЖТ      ptyStreams.set(ptyId, new Set())
   137тЖТ    }
   138тЖТ    ptyStreams.get(ptyId)!.add(ws)
   139тЖТ
   140тЖТ    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'connected', ptyId }))
   141тЖТ
   142тЖТ    // Flush any buffered data
   143тЖТ    flushPtyBuffer(ptyId, ws, deps.getPtyDataBuffer())
   144тЖТ
   145тЖТ    ws.on('message', (message: Buffer) => {
   146тЖТ      try {
   147тЖТ        const msg = JSON.parse(message.toString())
   148тЖТ
   149тЖТ        switch (msg.type) {
   150тЖТ          case 'input':
   151тЖТ            if (msg.data && ptyManager) {
   152тЖТ              ptyManager.write(ptyId, msg.data)
   153тЖТ            }
   154тЖТ            break
   155тЖТ
   156тЖТ          case 'resize':
   157тЖТ            if (msg.cols && msg.rows && ptyManager) {
   158тЖТ              ptyManager.resize(ptyId, msg.cols, msg.rows)
   159тЖТ            }
   160тЖТ            break
   161тЖТ
   162тЖТ          case 'ping':
   163тЖТ            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   164тЖТ            break
   165тЖТ
   166тЖТ          default:
   167тЖТ            log('Unknown PTY stream message type', { type: msg.type, ptyId })
   168тЖТ        }
   169тЖТ      } catch (e) {
   170тЖТ        log('Invalid PTY stream message', { error: String(e), ptyId })
   171тЖТ      }
   172тЖТ    })
   173тЖТ
   174тЖТ    ws.on('close', () => {
   175тЖТ      log('PTY stream disconnected', { ptyId })
   176тЖТ      ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   177тЖТ      if (ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.size === 0) {
   178тЖТ        ptyStreams.delete(ptyId)
   179тЖТ      }
   180тЖТ    })
   181тЖТ
   182тЖТ    ws.on('error', (err) => {
   183тЖТ      log('PTY stream error', { error: String(err), ptyId })
   184тЖТ      ptyStreams.get(ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   185тЖТ    })
   186тЖТ  })
   187тЖТ}
   188тЖТ
   189тЖТfunction handleWebSocketMessage(ws: WebSocket, msg: any, deps: WebSocketManagerDeps): void {
   190тЖТ  const ptyManager = deps.getPtyManager()
   191тЖТ  const terminalSubscriptions = deps.getTerminalSubscriptions()
   192тЖТ
   193тЖТ  switch (msg.type) {
   194тЖТ    case 'subscribe':
   195тЖТ      if (msg.ptyId) {
   196тЖТ        if (!terminalSubscriptions.has(msg.ptyId)) {
   197тЖТ          terminalSubscriptions.set(msg.ptyId, new Set())
   198тЖТ        }
   199тЖТ        terminalSubscriptions.get(msg.ptyId)!.add(ws)
   200тЖТ        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'subscribed', ptyId: msg.ptyId }))
   201тЖТ      }
   202тЖТ      break
   203тЖТ
   204тЖТ    case 'unsubscribe':
   205тЖТ      if (msg.ptyId) {
   206тЖТ        terminalSubscriptions.get(msg.ptyId)?.delete(ws)
   207тЖТ      }
   208тЖТ      break
   209тЖТ
   210тЖТ    case 'write':
   211тЖТ      if (msg.ptyId && msg.data && ptyManager) {
   212тЖТ        ptyManager.write(msg.ptyId, msg.data)
   213тЖТ      }
   214тЖТ      break
   215тЖТ
   216тЖТ    case 'resize':
   217тЖТ      if (msg.ptyId && msg.cols && msg.rows && ptyManager) {
   218тЖТ        ptyManager.resize(msg.ptyId, msg.cols, msg.rows)
   219тЖТ      }
   220тЖТ      break
   221тЖТ
   222тЖТ    case 'ping':
   223тЖТ      ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() }))
   224тЖТ      break
   225тЖТ  }
   226тЖТ}
   227тЖТ
   228тЖТfunction flushPtyBuffer(ptyId: string, ws: WebSocket, ptyDataBuffer: Map<string, string[]>): void {
   229тЖТ  const buffer = ptyDataBuffer.get(ptyId)
   230тЖТ  if (!buffer || buffer.length === 0) return
   231тЖТ
   232тЖТ  buffer.forEach(data => {
   233тЖТ    if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   234тЖТ      ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'data', data }))
   235тЖТ    }
   236тЖТ  })
   237тЖТ
   238тЖТ  ptyDataBuffer.delete(ptyId)
   239тЖТ}
   240тЖТ
   241тЖТfunction sendPendingFilesToClient(ws: WebSocket, pendingFiles: Map<string, PendingFile>): void {

   243тЖТ  // Clean up expired files first
   244тЖТ  for (const [fileId, file] of pendingFiles) {
   245тЖТ    if (file.expiresAt < now) {
   246тЖТ      pendingFiles.delete(fileId)
   247тЖТ    }
   248тЖТ  }
   249тЖТ
   250тЖТ  const files = Array.from(pendingFiles.values()).map(f => ({
   251тЖТ    id: f.id,
   252тЖТ    name: f.name,
   253тЖТ    size: f.size,
   254тЖТ    mimeType: f.mimeType,
   255тЖТ    message: f.message
   256тЖТ  }))
   257тЖТ
   258тЖТ  if (files.length > 0) {
   259тЖТ    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'files:pending', files }))
   260тЖТ  }
   261тЖТ}
   262тЖТ
   263тЖТexport function broadcastTerminalData(
   264тЖТ  ptyId: string,
   265тЖТ  data: string,
   266тЖТ  terminalSubscriptions: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>
   267тЖТ): void {
   268тЖТ  const subscribers = terminalSubscriptions.get(ptyId)
   269тЖТ  if (!subscribers) return
   270тЖТ
   271тЖТ  const message = JSON.stringify({

   283тЖТ
   284тЖТexport function broadcastPtyData(

1тЖТimport { BrowserWindow, ipcMain } from 'electron'
     2тЖТimport { PtyManager } from '../../pty-manager.js'
     3тЖТimport { SessionStore } from '../../session-store.js'
     4тЖТimport { ApiServerManager } from '../../api-server.js'
     5тЖТimport { pendingApiPrompts, autoCloseSessions } from '../api-prompt-handler.js'
     6тЖТ
     7тЖТfunction maybeRespondToCursorPositionRequest(
     8тЖТ  ptyManager: PtyManager,
     9тЖТ  ptyToBackend: Map<string, string>,
    10тЖТ  ptyId: string,
    11тЖТ  data: string
    12тЖТ): void {
    13тЖТ  const backend = ptyToBackend.get(ptyId)
    14тЖТ  if (!backend || backend === 'claude') return
    15тЖТ  if (data.includes('\x1b[6n') || data.includes('\x1b[?6n')) {
    16тЖТ    ptyManager.write(ptyId, '\x1b[1;1R')
    17тЖТ  }
    18тЖТ}
    19тЖТ
    20тЖТexport function registerPtyHandlers(
    21тЖТ  ptyManager: PtyManager,
    22тЖТ  sessionStore: SessionStore,
    23тЖТ  apiServerManager: ApiServerManager,
    24тЖТ  ptyToProject: Map<string, string>,
    25тЖТ  ptyToBackend: Map<string, string>,
    26тЖТ  getMainWindow: () => BrowserWindow | null
    27тЖТ): void {
    28тЖТ  ipcMain.handle('pty:spawn', (_, { cwd, sessionId, model, backend }: { cwd: string; sessionId?: string; model?: string; backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider' }) => {
    29тЖТ    try {
    30тЖТ      const workspace = sessionStore.getWorkspace()
    31тЖТ      const project = workspace.projects.find(p => p.path === cwd)
    32тЖТ      const globalSettings = sessionStore.getSettings()
    33тЖТ
    34тЖТ      const normalizedGlobalBackend = globalSettings.backend === 'default'
    35тЖТ        ? undefined
    36тЖТ        : globalSettings.backend
    37тЖТ
    38тЖТ      const normalizedBackend = backend === 'default' ? undefined : backend
    39тЖТ      const effectiveBackend = normalizedBackend
    40тЖТ        || (project?.backend && project.backend !== 'default'
    41тЖТ          ? project.backend
    42тЖТ          : normalizedGlobalBackend || 'claude')
    43тЖТ
    44тЖТ      const pending = pendingApiPrompts.get(cwd)
    45тЖТ      const effectiveModel = model || pending?.model
    46тЖТ      const autoAcceptTools = project?.autoAcceptTools ?? globalSettings.autoAcceptTools
    47тЖТ      const permissionMode = project?.permissionMode ?? globalSettings.permissionMode
    48тЖТ
    49тЖТ      const id = ptyManager.spawn(cwd, sessionId, autoAcceptTools, permissionMode, effectiveModel, effectiveBackend)
    50тЖТ      ptyToProject.set(id, cwd)
    51тЖТ      ptyToBackend.set(id, effectiveBackend)
    52тЖТ
    53тЖТ      if (project?.apiPort && project.apiAutoStart && !apiServerManager.isRunning(cwd)) {
    54тЖТ        apiServerManager.start(cwd, project.apiPort)
    55тЖТ      }
    56тЖТ
    57тЖТ      const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    58тЖТ
    59тЖТ      ptyManager.onData(id, (data) => {
    60тЖТ        maybeRespondToCursorPositionRequest(ptyManager, ptyToBackend, id, data)
    61тЖТ        try {
    62тЖТ          mainWindow?.webContents.send(`pty:data:${id}`, data)
    63тЖТ        } catch (e) {

    65тЖТ        }
    66тЖТ      })
    67тЖТ

    74тЖТ        ptyToProject.delete(id)
    75тЖТ        ptyToBackend.delete(id)
    76тЖТ        autoCloseSessions.delete(id)
    77тЖТ      })
    78тЖТ
    79тЖТ      if (pending) {
    80тЖТ        pendingApiPrompts.delete(cwd)
    81тЖТ        if (pending.autoClose) autoCloseSessions.add(id)
    82тЖТ        setTimeout(() => {
    83тЖТ          // Verify PTY still exists before writing (race condition guard)
    84тЖТ          if (ptyManager.getProcess(id)) {
    85тЖТ            ptyManager.write(id, pending.prompt + '\n')
    86тЖТ            pending.resolve({ success: true, message: 'Prompt sent to new terminal', sessionCreated: true })
    87тЖТ          } else {

    89тЖТ          }

    91тЖТ      }
    92тЖТ
    93тЖТ      return id

    97тЖТ      if (pending) {
    98тЖТ        pendingApiPrompts.delete(cwd)
    99тЖТ        pending.resolve({ success: false, error: `Failed to start terminal: ${error.message}` })
   100тЖТ      }

     1тЖТimport { BrowserWindow, ipcMain } from 'electron'

     5тЖТimport { pendingApiPrompts, autoCloseSessions } from '../api-prompt-handler.js'
     6тЖТ
     7тЖТfunction maybeRespondToCursorPositionRequest(
     8тЖТ  ptyManager: PtyManager,
     9тЖТ  ptyToBackend: Map<string, string>,
    10тЖТ  ptyId: string,
    11тЖТ  data: string
    12тЖТ): void {
    13тЖТ  const backend = ptyToBackend.get(ptyId)
    14тЖТ  if (!backend || backend === 'claude') return
    15тЖТ  if (data.includes('\x1b[6n') || data.includes('\x1b[?6n')) {
    16тЖТ    ptyManager.write(ptyId, '\x1b[1;1R')
    17тЖТ  }
    18тЖТ}
    19тЖТ

    27тЖТ): void {
    28тЖТ  ipcMain.handle('pty:spawn', (_, { cwd, sessionId, model, backend }: { cwd: string; sessionId?: string; model?: string; backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider' }) => {
    29тЖТ    try {
    30тЖТ      const workspace = sessionStore.getWorkspace()
    31тЖТ      const project = workspace.projects.find(p => p.path === cwd)
    32тЖТ      const globalSettings = sessionStore.getSettings()
    33тЖТ
    34тЖТ      const normalizedGlobalBackend = globalSettings.backend === 'default'
    35тЖТ        ? undefined
    36тЖТ        : globalSettings.backend
    37тЖТ
    38тЖТ      const normalizedBackend = backend === 'default' ? undefined : backend
    39тЖТ      const effectiveBackend = normalizedBackend
    40тЖТ        || (project?.backend && project.backend !== 'default'
    41тЖТ          ? project.backend
    42тЖТ          : normalizedGlobalBackend || 'claude')
    43тЖТ
    44тЖТ      const pending = pendingApiPrompts.get(cwd)
    45тЖТ      const effectiveModel = model || pending?.model
    46тЖТ      const autoAcceptTools = project?.autoAcceptTools ?? globalSettings.autoAcceptTools
    47тЖТ      const permissionMode = project?.permissionMode ?? globalSettings.permissionMode
    48тЖТ
    49тЖТ      const id = ptyManager.spawn(cwd, sessionId, autoAcceptTools, permissionMode, effectiveModel, effectiveBackend)
    50тЖТ      ptyToProject.set(id, cwd)
    51тЖТ      ptyToBackend.set(id, effectiveBackend)
    52тЖТ

    74тЖТ        ptyToProject.delete(id)

    78тЖТ
    79тЖТ      if (pending) {

    87тЖТ          } else {
    88тЖТ            pending.resolve({ success: false, error: 'Terminal exited before prompt could be sent' })
    89тЖТ          }
    90тЖТ        }, 4000)
    91тЖТ      }
    92тЖТ
    93тЖТ      return id
    94тЖТ    } catch (error: any) {
    95тЖТ      // Resolve pending prompt immediately on spawn failure instead of waiting for 30s timeout
    96тЖТ      const pending = pendingApiPrompts.get(cwd)
    97тЖТ      if (pending) {
    98тЖТ        pendingApiPrompts.delete(cwd)
    99тЖТ        pending.resolve({ success: false, error: `Failed to start terminal: ${error.message}` })
   100тЖТ      }
   101тЖТ      console.error('Failed to spawn PTY:', error)
   102тЖТ      throw new Error(`Failed to start Claude: ${error.message}`)
   103тЖТ    }
   104тЖТ  })
   105тЖТ
   106тЖТ  ipcMain.on('pty:write', (_, { id, data }: { id: string; data: string }) => ptyManager.write(id, data))

1тЖТ/**
     2тЖТ * Authentication Rate Limiting Module
     3тЖТ *
     4тЖТ * Provides rate limiting for failed authentication attempts.
     5тЖТ */
     6тЖТ
     7тЖТimport type { RateLimitEntry } from './types.js'
     8тЖТ
     9тЖТ// Constants
    10тЖТconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5
    11тЖТconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 15 * 60 * 1000 // 15 minutes
    12тЖТconst RATE_LIMIT_BLOCK_DURATION_MS = 15 * 60 * 1000 // 15 minutes
    13тЖТ
    14тЖТconst rateLimitStore = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>()
    15тЖТ
    16тЖТ/**
    17тЖТ * Check if an IP is rate limited
    18тЖТ * Returns { allowed: boolean, retryAfter?: number }
    19тЖТ */
    20тЖТexport function checkRateLimit(ip: string): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter?: number } {
    21тЖТ  const now = Date.now()
    22тЖТ  const entry = rateLimitStore.get(ip)
    23тЖТ
    24тЖТ  if (!entry) {
    25тЖТ    return { allowed: true }
    26тЖТ  }
    27тЖТ
    28тЖТ  // Check if currently blocked
    29тЖТ  if (entry.blockedUntil && entry.blockedUntil > now) {
    30тЖТ    return {
    31тЖТ      allowed: false,
    32тЖТ      retryAfter: Math.ceil((entry.blockedUntil - now) / 1000)
    33тЖТ    }
    34тЖТ  }
    35тЖТ
    36тЖТ  // Block expired or window expired тАФ reset so user gets fresh attempts
    37тЖТ  if ((entry.blockedUntil && entry.blockedUntil <= now) || now - entry.lastAttempt > RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS) {
    38тЖТ    rateLimitStore.delete(ip)
    39тЖТ    return { allowed: true }
    40тЖТ  }
    41тЖТ
    42тЖТ  return { allowed: true }
    43тЖТ}
    44тЖТ
    45тЖТ/**
    46тЖТ * Record a failed authentication attempt for an IP
    47тЖТ * Returns true if the IP is now blocked
    48тЖТ */
    49тЖТexport function recordFailedAuth(ip: string): boolean {
    50тЖТ  const now = Date.now()
    51тЖТ  const entry = rateLimitStore.get(ip)
    52тЖТ
    53тЖТ  if (!entry) {
    54тЖТ    rateLimitStore.set(ip, {
    55тЖТ      attempts: 1,
    56тЖТ      lastAttempt: now,
    57тЖТ      blockedUntil: null
    58тЖТ    })
    59тЖТ    return false
    60тЖТ  }
    61тЖТ
    62тЖТ  // Reset if window has expired
    63тЖТ  if (now - entry.lastAttempt > RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS) {
    64тЖТ    rateLimitStore.set(ip, {
    65тЖТ      attempts: 1,
    66тЖТ      lastAttempt: now,
    67тЖТ      blockedUntil: null
    68тЖТ    })
    69тЖТ    return false
    70тЖТ  }
    71тЖТ
    72тЖТ  // Increment attempts
    73тЖТ  entry.attempts++
    74тЖТ  entry.lastAttempt = now
    75тЖТ
    76тЖТ  // Block if too many attempts
    77тЖТ  if (entry.attempts >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX_ATTEMPTS) {
    78тЖТ    entry.blockedUntil = now + RATE_LIMIT_BLOCK_DURATION_MS
    79тЖТ    return true
    80тЖТ  }
    81тЖТ
    82тЖТ  return false
    83тЖТ}
    84тЖТ
    85тЖТ/**
    86тЖТ * Clear rate limit for an IP (call on successful auth)
    87тЖТ */
    88тЖТexport function clearRateLimit(ip: string): void {
    89тЖТ  rateLimitStore.delete(ip)
    90тЖТ}
    91тЖТ
    92тЖТ/**
    93тЖТ * Get rate limit status for debugging
    94тЖТ */
    95тЖТexport function getRateLimitStatus(ip: string): RateLimitEntry | null {
    96тЖТ  return rateLimitStore.get(ip) || null
    97тЖТ}
    98тЖТ
    99тЖТexport const authRateLimitConfig = {
   100тЖТ  RATE_LIMIT_MAX_ATTEMPTS,
   101тЖТ  RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS,
   102тЖТ  RATE_LIMIT_BLOCK_DURATION_MS
   103тЖТ} as const
   104тЖТ

    10тЖТ  handleInitKspec: () => Promise<void>
    11тЖТ  handleUpgradeToKspec: () => Promise<void>
    12тЖТ  handleInstallPython: () => Promise<void>
    13тЖТ  handleInstallBeads: () => Promise<void>
    14тЖТ  handleCreateTask: () => Promise<void>
    15тЖТ  handleCompleteTask: (taskId: string) => Promise<void>
    16тЖТ  handleDeleteTask: (taskId: string) => Promise<void>
    17тЖТ  handleCycleStatus: (taskId: string, currentStatus: string) => Promise<void>
    18тЖТ  handleSaveEdit: () => Promise<void>
    19тЖТ  handleCancelEdit: () => void
    20тЖТ  handleClearCompleted: () => Promise<void>
    21тЖТ  upgrading: boolean
    22тЖТ}
    23тЖТ
    24тЖТexport interface TaskCrudState {
    25тЖТ  showCreateModal: boolean
    26тЖТ  setShowCreateModal: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<boolean>>
    27тЖТ  newTaskTitle: string
    28тЖТ  setNewTaskTitle: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string>>
    29тЖТ  newTaskType: string
    30тЖТ  setNewTaskType: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string>>
    31тЖТ  newTaskPriority: number
    32тЖТ  setNewTaskPriority: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<number>>
    33тЖТ  newTaskDescription: string
    34тЖТ  setNewTaskDescription: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string>>
    35тЖТ  newTaskLabels: string
    36тЖТ  setNewTaskLabels: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string>>
    37тЖТ  newTaskAutomation: AutomationEligibility | ''
    38тЖТ  setNewTaskAutomation: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<AutomationEligibility | ''>>
    39тЖТ  editingTaskId: string | null
    40тЖТ  setEditingTaskId: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string | null>>
    41тЖТ  editingTitle: string
    42тЖТ  setEditingTitle: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string>>
    43тЖТ  editInputRef: React.RefObject<HTMLInputElement>
    44тЖТ}
    45тЖТ
    46тЖТinterface UseBeadsTasksParams {
    47тЖТ  projectPath: string | null
    48тЖТ  beadsState: BeadsState
    49тЖТ  setBeadsState: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<BeadsState>>
    50тЖТ  tasks: UnifiedTask[]
    51тЖТ  setTasks: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<UnifiedTask[]>>
    52тЖТ  currentProjectRef: React.MutableRefObject<string | null>
    53тЖТ  suppressWatcherReloadRef: React.MutableRefObject<boolean>
    54тЖТ  setError: (error: string) => void
    55тЖТ  adapter: TaskAdapter | null
    56тЖТ  backendKind: BackendKind
    57тЖТ}
    58тЖТ
    59тЖТexport function useBeadsTasks({
    60тЖТ  projectPath,
    61тЖТ  beadsState,
    62тЖТ  setBeadsState,
    63тЖТ  tasks,
    64тЖТ  setTasks,
    65тЖТ  currentProjectRef,
    66тЖТ  suppressWatcherReloadRef,
    67тЖТ  setError,
    68тЖТ  adapter,
    69тЖТ  backendKind
    70тЖТ}: UseBeadsTasksParams): TaskCrudCallbacks & TaskCrudState {
    71тЖТ  const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false)
    72тЖТ  const [newTaskTitle, setNewTaskTitle] = useState('')
    73тЖТ  const [newTaskType, setNewTaskType] = useState<string>('task')
    74тЖТ  const [newTaskPriority, setNewTaskPriority] = useState<number>(2)
    75тЖТ  const [newTaskDescription, setNewTaskDescription] = useState('')
    76тЖТ  const [newTaskLabels, setNewTaskLabels] = useState('')
    77тЖТ  const [newTaskAutomation, setNewTaskAutomation] = useState<AutomationEligibility | ''>('')
    78тЖТ  const [editingTaskId, setEditingTaskId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    79тЖТ  const [editingTitle, setEditingTitle] = useState('')
    80тЖТ  const editInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
    81тЖТ  const [upgrading, setUpgrading] = useState(false)
    82тЖТ
    83тЖТ  const loadTasks = useCallback(async (showLoading = true) => {
    84тЖТ    if (!projectPath) return
    85тЖТ
    86тЖТ    const loadingForProject = projectPath
    87тЖТ
    88тЖТ    if (showLoading) setBeadsState({ status: 'loading' })
    89тЖТ
    90тЖТ    try {
    91тЖТ      // Detect backend if we don't have an adapter yet
    92тЖТ      const kind = backendKind !== 'none' ? backendKind : await detectBackend(loadingForProject)
    93тЖТ      const currentAdapter = kind !== 'none' ? getAdapter(kind) : null
    94тЖТ
    95тЖТ      if (currentProjectRef.current !== loadingForProject) return
    96тЖТ
    97тЖТ      if (!currentAdapter) {
    98тЖТ        // Check if beads is at least installable
    99тЖТ        const beadsStatus = await window.electronAPI?.beadsCheck(loadingForProject)
   100тЖТ        if (currentProjectRef.current !== loadingForProject) return
   101тЖТ
   102тЖТ        if (!beadsStatus?.installed) {
   103тЖТ          setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: null, needsPython: false, installError: null, installStatus: null })
   104тЖТ          return
   105тЖТ        }
   106тЖТ
   107тЖТ        // Neither backend initialized тАФ offer choice
   108тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'not_initialized', initializing: false, availableBackends: ['beads', 'kspec'] })
   109тЖТ        return
   110тЖТ      }
   111тЖТ
   112тЖТ      // Backend found тАФ check status
   113тЖТ      const status = await currentAdapter.check(loadingForProject)
   114тЖТ      if (currentProjectRef.current !== loadingForProject) return
   115тЖТ
   116тЖТ      beadsStatusCache.set(loadingForProject, status)
   117тЖТ
   118тЖТ      if (!status.initialized) {
   119тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'not_initialized', initializing: false, availableBackends: [kind] })
   120тЖТ        return
   121тЖТ      }
   122тЖТ
   123тЖТ      // Load tasks via adapter
   124тЖТ      const taskList = await currentAdapter.list(loadingForProject)
   125тЖТ      if (currentProjectRef.current !== loadingForProject) return
   126тЖТ
   127тЖТ      setTasks(taskList)
   128тЖТ      tasksCache.set(loadingForProject, taskList)
   129тЖТ      setBeadsState({ status: 'ready' })
   130тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   131тЖТ      if (currentProjectRef.current === loadingForProject) {
   132тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'error', error: String(e) })
   133тЖТ      }
   134тЖТ    }
   135тЖТ  }, [projectPath, setBeadsState, setTasks, currentProjectRef, backendKind])
   136тЖТ
   137тЖТ  const handleInitBeads = async (): Promise<void> => {
   138тЖТ    if (!projectPath) return
   139тЖТ    if (beadsState.status !== 'not_initialized') return
   140тЖТ
   141тЖТ    setBeadsState({ status: 'not_initialized', initializing: true, availableBackends: ['beads'] })
   142тЖТ
   143тЖТ    try {
   144тЖТ      const result = await window.electronAPI?.beadsInit(projectPath)
   145тЖТ      if (result?.success) {
   146тЖТ        loadTasks()
   147тЖТ      } else {
   148тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'error', error: result?.error || 'Failed to initialize beads' })
   149тЖТ      }
   150тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   151тЖТ      setBeadsState({ status: 'error', error: String(e) })
   152тЖТ    }
   153тЖТ  }
   154тЖТ
   155тЖТ  const handleInitKspec = async (): Promise<void> => {
   156тЖТ    if (!projectPath) return
   157тЖТ    if (beadsState.status !== 'not_initialized') return
   158тЖТ
   159тЖТ    setBeadsState({ status: 'not_initialized', initializing: true, availableBackends: ['kspec'] })
   160тЖТ
   161тЖТ    try {
   162тЖТ      const result = await window.electronAPI?.kspecInit?.(projectPath)
   163тЖТ      if (result?.success) {
   164тЖТ        // Ensure daemon is running
   165тЖТ        await window.electronAPI?.kspecEnsureDaemon?.(projectPath)
   166тЖТ        loadTasks()
   167тЖТ      } else {
   168тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'error', error: result?.error || 'Failed to initialize kspec' })
   169тЖТ      }
   170тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   171тЖТ      setBeadsState({ status: 'error', error: String(e) })
   172тЖТ    }
   173тЖТ  }
   174тЖТ
   175тЖТ  const handleUpgradeToKspec = async (): Promise<void> => {
   176тЖТ    if (!projectPath) return
   177тЖТ    setUpgrading(true)
   178тЖТ
   179тЖТ    try {
   180тЖТ      // Check if kspec CLI is installed, install if not
   181тЖТ      const cliCheck = await window.electronAPI?.kspecCheckCli?.()
   182тЖТ      if (!cliCheck?.installed) {
   183тЖТ        const installResult = await window.electronAPI?.kspecInstallCli?.()
   184тЖТ        if (!installResult?.success) {
   185тЖТ          setError(installResult?.error || 'Failed to install kspec CLI')
   186тЖТ          setUpgrading(false)
   187тЖТ          return
   188тЖТ        }
   189тЖТ      }
   190тЖТ
   191тЖТ      // Run migration: reads beads tasks, inits kspec, creates tasks, removes .beads/
   192тЖТ      const result = await window.electronAPI?.kspecMigrateFromBeads?.(projectPath)
   193тЖТ      if (!result?.success) {
   194тЖТ        setError(result?.error || 'Migration failed')
   195тЖТ        setUpgrading(false)
   196тЖТ        return
   197тЖТ      }
   198тЖТ
   199тЖТ      // Ensure daemon is running
   200тЖТ      await window.electronAPI?.kspecEnsureDaemon?.(projectPath)
   201тЖТ
   202тЖТ      // Clear caches and reload тАФ backend has changed from beads to kspec
   203тЖТ      tasksCache.delete(projectPath)
   204тЖТ      beadsStatusCache.delete(projectPath)
   205тЖТ      loadTasks()
   206тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   207тЖТ      setError(String(e))
   208тЖТ    } finally {
   209тЖТ      setUpgrading(false)
   210тЖТ    }
   211тЖТ  }
   212тЖТ
   213тЖТ  const handleInstallBeads = async (): Promise<void> => {
   214тЖТ    setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: 'beads', needsPython: false, installError: null, installStatus: null })
   215тЖТ
   216тЖТ    try {
   217тЖТ      const result = await window.electronAPI?.beadsInstall()
   218тЖТ      if (result?.success) {
   219тЖТ        loadTasks()
   220тЖТ      } else if (result?.needsPython) {
   221тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: null, needsPython: true, installError: result.error || 'Python is required', installStatus: null })
   222тЖТ      } else {
   223тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: null, needsPython: false, installError: result?.error || 'Installation failed', installStatus: null })
   224тЖТ      }
   225тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   226тЖТ      setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: null, needsPython: false, installError: String(e), installStatus: null })
   227тЖТ    }
   228тЖТ  }
   229тЖТ
   230тЖТ  const handleInstallPython = async (): Promise<void> => {
   231тЖТ    if (beadsState.status !== 'not_installed') return
   232тЖТ
   233тЖТ    setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: 'python', needsPython: true, installError: null, installStatus: 'Downloading Python...' })
   234тЖТ
   235тЖТ    try {
   236тЖТ      const result = await window.electronAPI?.pythonInstall()
   237тЖТ      if (result?.success) {
   238тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: null, needsPython: false, installError: null, installStatus: null })
   239тЖТ        handleInstallBeads()
   240тЖТ      } else {
   241тЖТ        setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: null, needsPython: true, installError: result?.error || 'Python installation failed', installStatus: null })
   242тЖТ      }
   243тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   244тЖТ      setBeadsState({ status: 'not_installed', installing: null, needsPython: true, installError: String(e), installStatus: null })
   245тЖТ    }
   246тЖТ  }
   247тЖТ
   248тЖТ  const handleCreateTask = async (): Promise<void> => {
   249тЖТ    if (!projectPath || !newTaskTitle.trim() || !adapter) return
   250тЖТ
   251тЖТ    try {
   252тЖТ      const result = await adapter.create(projectPath, {
   253тЖТ        title: newTaskTitle.trim(),
   254тЖТ        description: newTaskDescription.trim() || undefined,
   255тЖТ        priority: newTaskPriority,
   256тЖТ        type: newTaskType as CreateTaskParams['type'],
   257тЖТ        tags: newTaskLabels.trim() || undefined,
   258тЖТ        automation: newTaskAutomation || undefined
   259тЖТ      })
   260тЖТ      if (result.success) {
   261тЖТ        setNewTaskTitle('')
   262тЖТ        setNewTaskType('task')
   263тЖТ        setNewTaskPriority(backendKind === 'kspec' ? 3 : 2)
   264тЖТ        setNewTaskDescription('')
   265тЖТ        setNewTaskLabels('')
   266тЖТ        setNewTaskAutomation('')
   267тЖТ        setShowCreateModal(false)
   268тЖТ        loadTasks()
   269тЖТ      } else {
   270тЖТ        setError(result.error || 'Failed to create task')
   271тЖТ      }
   272тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   273тЖТ      setError(String(e))
   274тЖТ    }
   275тЖТ  }
   276тЖТ
   277тЖТ  const handleCompleteTask = async (taskId: string): Promise<void> => {
   278тЖТ    if (!projectPath || !adapter) return
   279тЖТ
   280тЖТ    const previousTasks = [...tasks]
   281тЖТ    const updatedTasks = tasks.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, status: 'closed' as const } : t)
   282тЖТ    setTasks(updatedTasks)
   283тЖТ    tasksCache.set(projectPath, updatedTasks)
   284тЖТ
   285тЖТ    try {
   286тЖТ      const result = await adapter.complete(projectPath, taskId)
   287тЖТ      if (!result.success) {
   288тЖТ        setTasks(previousTasks)
   289тЖТ        tasksCache.set(projectPath, previousTasks)
   290тЖТ        setError(result.error || 'Failed to complete task')
   291тЖТ      }
   292тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   293тЖТ      setTasks(previousTasks)
   294тЖТ      tasksCache.set(projectPath, previousTasks)
   295тЖТ      setError(String(e))
   296тЖТ    }
   297тЖТ  }
   298тЖТ
   299тЖТ  const handleDeleteTask = async (taskId: string): Promise<void> => {
   300тЖТ    if (!projectPath || !adapter) return
   301тЖТ
   302тЖТ    const previousTasks = [...tasks]
   303тЖТ    const updatedTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.id !== taskId)
   304тЖТ    setTasks(updatedTasks)
   305тЖТ    tasksCache.set(projectPath, updatedTasks)
   306тЖТ
   307тЖТ    try {
   308тЖТ      const result = await adapter.delete(projectPath, taskId)
   309тЖТ      if (!result.success) {
   310тЖТ        setTasks(previousTasks)
   311тЖТ        tasksCache.set(projectPath, previousTasks)
   312тЖТ        setError(result.error || 'Failed to delete task')
   313тЖТ      }
   314тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   315тЖТ      setTasks(previousTasks)
   316тЖТ      tasksCache.set(projectPath, previousTasks)
   317тЖТ      setError(String(e))
   318тЖТ    }
   319тЖТ  }
   320тЖТ
   321тЖТ  const handleCycleStatus = async (taskId: string, currentStatus: string): Promise<void> => {
   322тЖТ    if (!projectPath || !adapter) return
   323тЖТ
   324тЖТ    let nextStatus: string
   325тЖТ    switch (currentStatus) {
   326тЖТ      case 'open': nextStatus = 'in_progress'; break
   327тЖТ      case 'in_progress': nextStatus = 'closed'; break
   328тЖТ      default: nextStatus = 'open'
   329тЖТ    }
   330тЖТ
   331тЖТ    const previousTasks = [...tasks]
   332тЖТ    const updatedTasks = tasks.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, status: nextStatus as UnifiedTask['status'] } : t)
   333тЖТ    setTasks(updatedTasks)
   334тЖТ    tasksCache.set(projectPath, updatedTasks)
   335тЖТ
   336тЖТ    try {
   337тЖТ      // Use adapter.cycleStatus() which knows the correct lifecycle endpoints
   338тЖТ      // (e.g., kspec uses /start and /complete instead of generic PATCH)
   339тЖТ      const result = await adapter.cycleStatus(projectPath, taskId, currentStatus as UnifiedTask['status'])
   340тЖТ      if (!result.success) {
   341тЖТ        setTasks(previousTasks)
   342тЖТ        tasksCache.set(projectPath, previousTasks)
   343тЖТ        setError(result.error || 'Failed to update task status')
   344тЖТ      }
   345тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   346тЖТ      setTasks(previousTasks)
   347тЖТ      tasksCache.set(projectPath, previousTasks)
   348тЖТ      setError(String(e))
   349тЖТ    }
   350тЖТ  }
   351тЖТ
   352тЖТ  const handleSaveEdit = async (): Promise<void> => {
   353тЖТ    if (!projectPath || !editingTaskId || !editingTitle.trim() || !adapter) {
   354тЖТ      setEditingTaskId(null)
   355тЖТ      return
   356тЖТ    }
   357тЖТ
   358тЖТ    const originalTask = tasks.find(t => t.id === editingTaskId)
   359тЖТ    if (originalTask && originalTask.title === editingTitle.trim()) {
   360тЖТ      setEditingTaskId(null)
   361тЖТ      return
   362тЖТ    }
   363тЖТ
   364тЖТ    try {
   365тЖТ      const result = await adapter.update(projectPath, editingTaskId, { title: editingTitle.trim() })
   366тЖТ      if (result.success) {
   367тЖТ        loadTasks()
   368тЖТ      } else {
   369тЖТ        setError(result.error || 'Failed to update task title')
   370тЖТ      }
   371тЖТ    } catch (e) {
   372тЖТ      setError(String(e))
   373тЖТ    } finally {
   374тЖТ      setEditingTaskId(null)
   375тЖТ    }
   376тЖТ  }
   377тЖТ
   378тЖТ  const handleCancelEdit = (): void => {
   379тЖТ    setEditingTaskId(null)
   380тЖТ    setEditingTitle('')
   381тЖТ  }
   382тЖТ
   383тЖТ  const handleClearCompleted = async (): Promise<void> => {
   384тЖТ    if (!projectPath || !adapter) return
   385тЖТ
   386тЖТ    const closedTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'closed')
   387тЖТ    if (closedTasks.length === 0) return
   388тЖТ
   389тЖТ    const updatedTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.status !== 'closed')
   390тЖТ    setTasks(updatedTasks)
   391тЖТ    tasksCache.set(projectPath, updatedTasks)
   392тЖТ
   393тЖТ    suppressWatcherReloadRef.current = true
   394тЖТ
   395тЖТ    try {
   396тЖТ      await Promise.allSettled(
   397тЖТ        closedTasks.map(task => adapter.delete(projectPath, task.id))
   398тЖТ      )
   399тЖТ    } finally {
   400тЖТ      suppressWatcherReloadRef.current = false
   401тЖТ    }
   402тЖТ  }
   403тЖТ
   404тЖТ  // Set up watcher via adapter
   405тЖТ  useEffect(() => {
   406тЖТ    const isReady = beadsState.status === 'ready'
   407тЖТ    if (!projectPath || !isReady || !adapter) return
   408тЖТ
   409тЖТ    adapter.watch(projectPath)
   410тЖТ
   411тЖТ    const cleanup = adapter.onTasksChanged((data: { cwd: string }) => {
   412тЖТ      if (data.cwd === projectPath && !suppressWatcherReloadRef.current) {
   413тЖТ        loadTasks(false)
   414тЖТ      }
   415тЖТ    })
   416тЖТ
   417тЖТ    return () => {
   418тЖТ      adapter.unwatch(projectPath)
   419тЖТ      cleanup()
   420тЖТ    }
   421тЖТ  }, [projectPath, beadsState.status, loadTasks, suppressWatcherReloadRef, adapter])
   422тЖТ
   423тЖТ  // Load tasks on mount and when project changes
   424тЖТ  useEffect(() => {
   425тЖТ    if (projectPath) {
   426тЖТ      loadTasks(false)
   427тЖТ    }
   428тЖТ  }, [projectPath, loadTasks])
   429тЖТ
   430тЖТ  return {
   431тЖТ    loadTasks,
   432тЖТ    handleInitBeads,
   433тЖТ    handleInitKspec,
   434тЖТ    handleUpgradeToKspec,
   435тЖТ    handleInstallPython,
   436тЖТ    handleInstallBeads,
   437тЖТ    handleCreateTask,
   438тЖТ    handleCompleteTask,
   439тЖТ    handleDeleteTask,
   440тЖТ    handleCycleStatus,
   441тЖТ    handleSaveEdit,
   442тЖТ    handleCancelEdit,
   443тЖТ    handleClearCompleted,
   444тЖТ    showCreateModal,
   445тЖТ    setShowCreateModal,
   446тЖТ    newTaskTitle,
   447тЖТ    setNewTaskTitle,
   448тЖТ    newTaskType,
   449тЖТ    setNewTaskType,
   450тЖТ    newTaskPriority,
   451тЖТ    setNewTaskPriority,
   452тЖТ    newTaskDescription,
   453тЖТ    setNewTaskDescription,
   454тЖТ    newTaskLabels,
   455тЖТ    setNewTaskLabels,
   456тЖТ    newTaskAutomation,
   457тЖТ    setNewTaskAutomation,
   458тЖТ    editingTaskId,
   459тЖТ    setEditingTaskId,
   460тЖТ    editingTitle,
   461тЖТ    setEditingTitle,
   462тЖТ    editInputRef,
   463тЖТ    upgrading
   464тЖТ  }
   465тЖТ}
   466тЖТ

Review the code changes on branch `origin/fix/bug-persistence` compared to `main` in this repository. The diff covers these files:

1. `src/main/session-store.ts` тАФ atomic writes for workspace persistence  
2. `src/main/mobile-server/routes/workspace.ts` тАФ workspace save route fix
3. `src/main/meta-project-sync.ts` тАФ stale symlink cleanup
4. `src/main/orchestrator-api.ts` тАФ port fallback improvements
5. `src/main/mobile-server/middleware.ts` тАФ CORS origin validation hardening
6. `src/main/mobile-server/websocket-manager.ts` тАФ PTY exit cleanup
7. `src/main/app/ipc-handlers/pty.ts` тАФ race condition guard
8. `src/main/mobile-security/auth-rate-limit.ts` тАФ block expiry fix
9. `src/main/ipc/kspec-handlers.ts` тАФ migration status mapping
10. `src/renderer/components/beads/adapters/kspec-adapter.ts` тАФ daemon recovery, status mapping, WS reconnect
11. `src/renderer/components/beads/useBeadsTasks.ts` тАФ use cycleStatus instead of direct update

For each file, read the current version on main and identify:

- Race conditions or edge cases not addressed
- Any regressions introduced by the changes
- Security issues

content.text:
It seems like git commands are being blocked. Since I cannot access the actual diff from `origin/fix/bug-persistence`, I'll perform the review based on the current code on the current branch (`fix/bug-sidebar`), analyzing each file for the specific issues you called out. The code I've read appears to already contain the changes described.

Here is my detailed review of each file:

---

## 1. `src/main/session-store.ts` -- Atomic Write Logic

**The good:** Write-to-temp-then-rename pattern (lines 190-197) is the correct approach for atomic writes. Re-reading and re-parsing the temp file before rename (lines 194-195) provides corruption detection.

**Issues found:**

- **Bug: Backup can overwrite good backup with soon-to-be-replaced data.** Lines 179-181: Before writing the new data, the code backs up the *current* main file. But on the next save, it will back up whatever was just written. If a crash happens mid-save (after backup overwrite but before rename), both the backup AND the temp file could be corrupt/stale. The backup should only be updated periodically or use a second backup slot.

- **Race condition: No file locking.** Multiple `save()` calls in quick succession (e.g., `saveWorkspace` + `saveWindowBounds` + `saveSettings` in rapid sequence) could interleave. `writeFileSync` is synchronous so it won't interleave within a single Node event loop tick, but back-to-back calls from different IPC handlers could cause the backup step to read a `.tmp` file left by a concurrent save. Low risk in practice since everything is synchronous, but worth noting.

- **Edge case: `JSON.parse(json)` on line 171 is redundant.** `JSON.stringify` will never produce invalid JSON from a valid object. This parse is wasted CPU. It doesn't hurt correctness but is unnecessary.

- **Missing: temp file cleanup on failure.** If `renameSync` throws (line 197), the `.tmp` file is left behind. On next save, `writeFileSync` will overwrite it, so this is benign but untidy.

---

## 2. `src/main/mobile-server/routes/workspace.ts` -- Double-wrapping Bug

**Bug confirmed: POST route reads wrong nesting level.** 

Lines 75-78 in the `POST /api/workspace` handler:
```typescript
const incomingProjects = incoming?.workspace?.projects?.length || 0
// ...
const currentProjects = current?.workspace?.projects?.length || 0
```

But `sessionStore.getWorkspace()` returns a `Workspace` object directly (not `{ workspace: ... }`), so `current?.workspace?.projects?.length` will always be `0` or `undefined`. This means the guard on line 79 will never trigger -- the check is bypassed entirely.

Meanwhile, on line 84, `sessionStore.saveWorkspace(req.body)` is called. If `req.body` is `{ workspace: { projects: [...] } }`, then `saveWorkspace` stores a doubly-wrapped object. If `req.body` is `{ projects: [...] }`, then line 75 reads `incoming?.workspace?.projects` which is `undefined`, so `incomingProjects` is 0, and since `currentProjects` is also always 0 (due to the bug above), the guard passes vacuously.

**The PUT handler (lines 43-65) reads `incoming?.projects?.length` correctly**, but the POST handler has inconsistent nesting expectations. This is a correctness bug -- the POST route either needs to unwrap `req.body.workspace` before calling `saveWorkspace`, or should expect the same flat format as PUT.

---

## 3. `src/main/meta-project-sync.ts` -- Stale Symlink Cleanup

**Generally sound.** The incremental update approach (lines 228-252) is correct.

**Issue: `removeSymlink` uses `existsSync` which follows symlinks.** Line 48: `existsSync(symlinkPath)` returns `false` for dangling symlinks (where the target doesn't exist). This means dangling symlinks won't be cleaned up by `removeSymlink`. The function does use `lstatSync` on line 49, but it's gated behind `existsSync`. Fix: use `lstatSync` directly in a try-catch instead of the `existsSync` guard.

**Minor: `rmSync` with `recursive: true` for an empty directory** (line 68) is overkill; `rmdirSync` would suffice. Not a bug.

---

## 4. `src/main/orchestrator-api.ts` -- Port Retry Logic

**Issues found:**

- **Race condition between `listen` and `error` callbacks.** Lines 65-77: `this.server!.listen(...)` is called, then `this.server!.once('error', ...)` is registered. If the error fires synchronously (unlikely but possible in edge cases), the handler might not be registered yet. However, Node.js `listen` is asynchronous, so the error will be emitted asynchronously -- this is safe in practice.

- **Bug: `listen` callback sets `activePort` but URL construction uses `activePort` for incoming requests.** Line 34: `new URL(req.url || '/', \`http://localhost:${this.activePort}\`)`. During the retry loop, if a request somehow arrives before the port is settled, `this.activePort` could be stale. Not a practical issue since the server isn't listening yet during retries.

- **Missing: server reuse after failed bind.** The same `this.server` object is reused across `tryListen` calls (lines 56-77). This is correct -- Node's `http.Server` can retry `listen` after an `EADDRINUSE` error without creating a new instance.

- **Missing: non-EADDRINUSE errors don't clean up.** Line 75: If a non-EADDRINUSE error occurs, the server is logged but not closed (`this.server` remains set). This means `start()` won't be callable again (line 19 returns early if `this.server` is set).

---

## 5. `src/main/mobile-server/middleware.ts` -- CORS Validation

**Issues found:**

- **Security: Tailscale CGNAT regex allows unintended IPs.** The regex on line 56 `100\.(6[4-9]|[7-9]\d|1[01]\d|12[0-7])` is meant to match 100.64.0.0-100.127.255.255. Let's verify: `[7-9]\d` matches 70-99, `1[01]\d` matches 100-119, `12[0-7]` matches 120-127. Combined with `6[4-9]` (64-69), this covers 64-127. This is correct for the Tailscale CGNAT range.

- **Security: `.ts.net` suffix check (line 62) could be spoofed.** An attacker owning `evil.ts.net` would pass CORS. However, `.ts.net` is controlled by Tailscale, so this is acceptable if you trust Tailscale's DNS.

- **No `\d` range validation.** The RFC 1918 regex on line 50 uses `\d+` for octets, which would match `10.999.999.999`. However, since this is validating a *hostname extracted from a URL*, browsers won't resolve such hostnames, so the risk is negligible.

---

## 6. `src/main/mobile-server/websocket-manager.ts` -- PTY Exit Cleanup

**The `broadcastPtyExit` function (lines 318-342) is correct.** It sends exit messages, closes WebSocket connections, and cleans up both `ptyStreams` and `terminalSubscriptions` maps.

**Issue: Potential double-close.** The `ws.onerror` handler (lines 182-184) removes the socket from `ptyStreams`, but `ws.onclose` (lines 174-179) also removes it. This is fine since `Set.delete` is idempotent. No bug here.

**Missing: Buffer cleanup on PTY exit.** When a PTY exits (line 340), `ptyStreams.delete(ptyId)` is called but `ptyDataBuffer` is not cleaned up. Buffered data for dead PTYs will persist in memory until a new client connects and calls `flushPtyBuffer`. Should add `ptyDataBuffer?.delete(ptyId)` in `broadcastPtyExit`.

---

## 7. `src/main/app/ipc-handlers/pty.ts` -- Race Condition Guard

**The guard on lines 83-89 is correct.** It checks `ptyManager.getProcess(id)` before writing the pending prompt, handling the case where the PTY exits during the 4-second delay.

**Issue: `mainWindow` is captured once at spawn time (line 57).** If the window is destroyed and recreated between spawn and data/exit events, `mainWindow` will be stale. The `getMainWindow()` function is available but only called once. Each `onData`/`onExit` callback should call `getMainWindow()` fresh. The `pty:set-backend` handler (line 132) has the same issue.

---

## 8. `src/main/mobile-security/auth-rate-limit.ts` -- Block Expiry Fix

**The fix on lines 37-39 is correct.** When `blockedUntil <= now` (block expired) OR the window has expired, the entry is deleted and the user gets fresh attempts. This is the right behavior.

**No issues found.** The logic is clean and handles all cases properly.

---

## 9. `src/main/ipc/kspec-handlers.ts` -- Migration Status Mapping

**Issue: Status mapping is incomplete in migration (lines 199-203).** The `kspecStatus` for `'open'` maps to default (pending), which is correct. But the task creation API call on line 211 sends `status: kspecStatus` which is `undefined` for open tasks. If the kspec API treats `undefined` status differently from `'pending'`, this could cause issues.

**Issue: Hardcoded daemon port 3456.** Lines 160, 173, 182, etc. all use `localhost:3456`. If the daemon port changes or is configurable, all these will break. Should be a constant.

**Issue: `updateCheckDone` (line 313) is a closure-scoped mutable variable** shared across all IPC calls. If two `kspec:ensure-daemon` calls race, the update check could run twice or not at all. Low severity.

---

## 10. `src/renderer/components/beads/adapters/kspec-adapter.ts` -- Module-Level Mutable State

**Bug: `_daemonEnsuredFlag` and `_daemonEnsuredForCwd` are module-level globals (lines 28-30).** If multiple `KspecAdapter` instances are created, they all share the same flag. This means:

1. One adapter's network failure resets the flag for all adapters.
2. If different adapters are used for different projects, the `_daemonEnsuredForCwd` check (line 96) will thrash, constantly resetting the flag.

These should be instance variables on the `KspecAdapter` class instead.

**Issue: WebSocket reconnect can leak.** In `connectWs` (line 246), if `this.ws` is already set (guard on line 247), the function returns early. But if `watch()` is called rapidly for the same `cwd`, the `onclose` reconnect timer (line 265) could fire and call `connectWs` while a connection is still being established (WebSocket in CONNECTING state). The guard `if (this.ws) return` would prevent a duplicate, but the old socket reference is set to `null` in `onclose` *before* the new connection attempt -- so this is actually fine.

**Issue: `normalizeStatus` maps `'pending_review'` and `'needs_work'` to `'open'` (lines 61-63).** These are distinct workflow states in kspec. Mapping them all to `'open'` loses information and could cause confusing UX where a task in review shows as "open".

---

## 11. `src/renderer/components/beads/useBeadsTasks.ts` -- cycleStatus Usage

**Correct.** Line 339 properly delegates to `adapter.cycleStatus()` which knows the backend-specific lifecycle endpoints (e.g., kspec uses `/start` and `/complete` instead of generic PATCH).

**Minor issue: Optimistic update may show wrong intermediate state.** Lines 324-329 compute `nextStatus` locally, but `adapter.cycleStatus()` might transition to a different status depending on backend-specific logic (e.g., kspec's `cycleStatus` for `'closed'` goes to `'pending'` which maps to `'open'`). The optimistic update assumes the local logic matches the backend logic. If they diverge, the UI will briefly show the wrong status until `loadTasks` refreshes.

---

## Summary of Critical Issues

1. **POST `/api/workspace` route (workspace.ts lines 75-78)**: Double-nested property access means the empty-workspace guard never triggers. This is a data-loss risk.

2. **Module-level mutable state in kspec-adapter.ts**: `_daemonEnsuredFlag` and `_daemonEnsuredForCwd` should be instance properties to avoid cross-instance interference.

3. **Dangling symlink cleanup in meta-project-sync.ts**: `existsSync` follows symlinks, so dangling symlinks won't be removed by `removeSymlink`.

4. **Stale `mainWindow` capture in pty.ts**: Window reference captured once at spawn time rather than looked up on each event.

5. **PTY data buffer leak in websocket-manager.ts**: `ptyDataBuffer` not cleaned up when PTY exits.

6. **Orchestrator non-EADDRINUSE error leaves server in broken state**: `this.server` is never nulled, preventing future `start()` calls.

If `req.body` is `{ projects: [...] }`, then line 75 reads `incoming?.workspace?.projects` which is `undefined`, so `incomingProjects` is 0, and since `currentProjects` is also always 0 (due to the bug above), the guard passes vacuously.
